description: Order quantity must satisfy safety-stock requirement per (store, sku)
Order quantity must not exceed configured max_order per (store, sku)
Sum of ordered volume per store must fit within storage_capacity_m3
Refrigerated SKUs volume per store must fit within refrigeration_capacity_m3
Truck load (m3) must not exceed truck capacity
Refrigerated SKUs may only travel on refrigerated trucks
Orders must be whole multiples of supplier case_size
Each SKU may be ordered only from its mapped supplier
Each truck may be used at most once per day
Supplier lead time must be respected (order day + lead_time <= delivery)
Fresh-category order must not exceed remaining shelf capacity
No same-day emergency orders (min lead time = 1 day)
Refrigerated trucks required if supplier ships refrigerated goods
Truck must be in the supplier's allowed-truck list
Each used truck trip must exceed 60% utilization
Dry and fresh categories cannot share the same truck trip
Each store accepts at most 3 supplier deliveries per day
Two conflicting suppliers cannot be received simultaneously (dock clash)
Minimise total cost (inventory + waste + transport + stockout)
Minimise expected waste on perishables
Minimise stockout risk
Balance truck utilisation across fleet
Prefer longer-shelf-life SKUs for bulk orders
Favour local suppliers (lower transport)
Minimise number of truck trips
Maintain service level per category
